story: Frederick Charles Tillis burst onto the world stage in 1930, born on January 5 in Galveston, Texas. This talented musician would grow up to compose masterpieces like 'In the Spirit and the Flesh' and 'Secrets of the African Baobab.' title: Zebulon Pike: Explorer of the Rockies
story: Zebulon Pike, born in 1779, would grow up to become a famous explorer. He discovered a towering mountain in Colorado that now bears his name: Pike's Peak. As a brigadier general, Pike led expeditions to map the American West. His adventures on January 5 and beyond helped shape our understanding of the Rocky Mountains.

title: A Naval Hero's Birth
story: Ahoy, matey! Stephen Decatur, a future American naval hero, was born in Sinepuxent, Maryland on January 5, 1779. title: A Champion for Civil Rights
story: Hosea Williams, a fearless civil rights leader, was born in 1926 in Attapulgus, Georgia. He grew up to become a key figure in the fight for equality.
